hooks.command: echo 'InterComm AIMFP plugin active (19 MCP tools for multi-instance coordination). To coordinate multiple Claude Code instances, the user picks one master: it calls intercomm_register(role: "master") and delegates to tmux-spawned workers; every other instance calls intercomm_register() as a worker. The full master/worker protocol auto-injects via the InterComm MCP instructions field (re-read with intercomm_get_protocol). InterComm AIMFP is a hard AIMFP addon — after registering as master, verify the AIMFP MCP tools are present and warn the user if they are absent.'
